basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Scientist and Laboratory Technician Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri)

age_limit.details: Research Scientist (B) (Medical): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules. Laboratory Technician: Age limit details are not specified.

qualification.details: Research Scientist (B) (Medical): MBBS degree recognized by MCI. Preference will be given to candidates having lab experience in Virology Research. Laboratory Technician: DMLT /Bsc-MLT/Msc-MLT with two years of experience in serology & molecular laboratory. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in virology research and knowledge of computer applications.

selection_process: Written tests may be conducted if the number of candidates applied is more. Shortlisting for interview based on written examination results. Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Mangalagiri Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Mangalagiri recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Scientist (B) (Medical) and Laboratory Technician posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with 1 for Research Scientist (B) (Medical) and 1 for Laboratory Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Scientist (B) (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is an MBBS degree recognized by MCI. Lab experience in Virology Research is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Laboratory Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a DMLT /Bsc-MLT/Msc-MLT with two years of experience in serology & molecular laboratory. Experience in virology research and computer application knowledge is preferred.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Research Scientist (B) (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Scientist (B) (Medical) post is Rs. 56000 plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Laboratory Technician position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Laboratory Technician post is Rs. 20000 plus HRA.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the Research Scientist (B) (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Scientist (B) (Medical) post is 35 years, with possible relaxation as per government rules.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must email their updated CV to [email protected] before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written test followed by an interview, depending on the number of applications.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
